title: Supply Chain Manager - Imperial Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Imperial Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!
